name: Good Reasons Italian Dressing Mix
recipeIngredient: Env Liptons Cream Of Chicken Soup Mix,  see note
Two Tablespoons Seasoned Salt (Or Mrs. Dash)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients into a bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture through a fine mesh sieve using the back of a large spoon.
3. Store in an airtight container and use within 4-5 months.
4. For preparation, mix 2 tablespoons of the blend with 1/4 cup vinegar, 2/3 cups oil, and 2 tablespoons water.
5. Vigorously shake the mixture to combine all components.
6.  Use one envelope of the soup mix or two square crushed soda crackers plus 1.5 teaspoons chicken bouillon powder and 1 teaspoon non-dairy creamer powder.
